name: qradar-offense-by-id

outputs.description: The credibility of the offense QRadar.Offense.Relevance The relevance of the offense
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.Credibility

outputs.description: The severity of the offense QRadar.Offense.SourceAddress The source addresses that are associated with the offense.
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.Severity

outputs.description: The local destination addresses that are associated with the offense. If your offense has a remote destination, you will need to use QRadarFullSearch playbook with the following query: SELECT destinationip FROM events WHERE inOffense() GROUP BY destinationip QRadar.Offense.RemoteDestinationCount
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.DestinationAddress

outputs.description: The remote destination that are associated with the offense. If this value is greater than 0 that means your offense has a remote destination, you will need to use QRadarFullSearch playbook with the following query: SELECT destinationip FROM events WHERE inOffense() GROUP BY destinationip QRadar.Offense.AssignedTo
outputs.name: unknown

outputs.description: The user the offense is assigned to QRadar.Offense.StartTime date
outputs.name: string

outputs.description: QRadar.Offense.ID int The ID of the offense.
outputs.name: The time (ISO) when the offense started

outputs.description: Destination hostname QRadar.Offense.Description The description of the offense
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.DestinationHostname

outputs.description: The number of events that are associated with the offense. QRadar.Offense.OffenseSource The source of the offense.
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.EventCount

outputs.description: The status of the offense ("OPEN", "HIDDEN", or "CLOSED") QRadar.Offense.Magnitude The magnitude of the offense.
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.Status

outputs.description: The user that closed the offense QRadar.Offense.ClosingReason The offense closing reason.
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.ClosingUser

outputs.description: date The time when the offense was closed. QRadar.Offense.LastUpdatedTime
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.CloseTime

outputs.description: The time (ISO) when the offense was last updated. QRadar.Offense.Categories Event categories that are associated with the offense.
outputs.name: date

outputs.description: The number of flows that are associated with the offense. QRadar.Offense.FollowUp Offense followup.
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.FlowCount

outputs.description: A number that represents the offense type QRadar.Offense.Protected Is the offense protected
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.OffenseType
